# Configuration reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-config-examples.py. Do not edit by hand. -->

This page is generated from the application settings registry. Regenerate it when `Settings` or `SETTING_SPECS` changes.

Machine-readable configuration metadata is committed at [`generated/configuration.json`](generated/configuration.json). Complete copy-editable examples are committed at the repository root as `.env.example` and `config.example.yaml`.

Settings resolve in this order:

```text
defaults < config file < LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_* environment variables < CLI arguments
```

YAML config files use flat setting names such as `auth_mode` and `workspace_root`. Nested groups are not read by the application settings loader.

`audit_log_path` and `agent_config_dir` are derived from `state_dir` as `audit_log/audit.jsonl` and `agent_config`; they are not standalone settings.

## Server

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `mode` | `--mode` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MODE` | mcp \| http \| both \| stdio | `mcp` | Server transport mode. |
| `host` | `--host` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_HOST` | string | `0.0.0.0` | Bind host for HTTP/MCP transports. |
| `port` | `--port` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_PORT` | integer | `8765` | Bind port for HTTP/MCP transports. |

## Paths and state

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `workspace_root` | `--workspace-root` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_WORKSPACE_ROOT` | path | `/workspace` | Root directory for workspace. |
| `state_dir` | `--state-dir` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_STATE_DIR` | path | `/workspace/.local-shell-mcp` | Directory for runtime state. Including audit logs, temporary files, and config |

## Authentication and OAuth

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `auth_mode` | `--auth-mode` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AUTH_MODE` | none \| oauth | `oauth` | Authentication mode. Do not expose public services with none. |
| `auth_bypass_localhost` | `--auth-bypass-localhost` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AUTH_BYPASS_LOCALHOST` | true \| false | `true` | Allow localhost requests without bearer authentication. |
| `base_url` | `--base-url`<br>`--unset-base-url` clears the value | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_BASE_URL` | string | `unset` | Externally reachable base URL used for OAuth metadata, callbacks, and generated links. If unset, request-aware routes derive it from forwarded/Host headers, and non-request generated links fall back to the bind host and port. |
| `oauth_issuer` | `--oauth-issuer`<br>`--unset-oauth-issuer` clears the value | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_OAUTH_ISSUER` | string | `unset` | Override URL for OAuth issuer metadata; usually derived from base_url. |
| `oauth_resource` | `--oauth-resource`<br>`--unset-oauth-resource` clears the value | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_OAUTH_RESOURCE` | string | `unset` | Override URL for OAuth resource metadata; usually derived from base_url plus /mcp. |
| `oauth_admin_pin` | `--oauth-admin-pin`<br>`--unset-oauth-admin-pin` clears the value | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_OAUTH_ADMIN_PIN` | string | `unset` | Admin PIN required to approve OAuth authorization. |
| `oauth_access_token_ttl_s` | `--oauth-access-token-ttl-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_OAUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN_TTL_S` | integer | `3600` | Bearer token lifetime in seconds. After this time, the token must be re-authorized and refreshed. |
| `oauth_code_ttl_s` | `--oauth-code-ttl-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_OAUTH_CODE_TTL_S` | integer | `300` | OAuth authorization-code lifetime in seconds. The authorization must be done within this time. |

## Safety and resource limits

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `allow_full_control` | `--allow-full-control` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_ALLOW_FULL_CONTROL` | true \| false | `false` | Disable built-in workspace and command restrictions; use only in disposable containers or VMs. This enforces relaxed_client_tool_hints. |
| `allow_network` | `--allow-network` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_ALLOW_NETWORK` | true \| false | `true` | Allow network-capable operations. |
| `relaxed_client_tool_hints` | `--relaxed-client-tool-hints` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_RELAXED_CLIENT_TOOL_HINTS` | true \| false | `false` | Advertise lower-risk MCP client hints for tools so that clients can run them with fewer confirmations. |
| `tool_timeout_s` | `--tool-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT_S` | number | `60` | MCP/HTTP tool watchdog timeout in seconds. |
| `run_shell_default_timeout_s` | `--run-shell-default-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_RUN_SHELL_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_S` | integer | `10` | Default timeout for run_shell_command calls in seconds. |
| `run_shell_max_timeout_s` | `--run-shell-max-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_RUN_SHELL_MAX_TIMEOUT_S` | integer | `60` | Maximum timeout accepted by run_shell_command calls in seconds. |
| `max_output_bytes` | `--max-output-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES` | integer | `200000` | Command output limit in bytes. |
| `max_file_read_bytes` | `--max-file-read-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_FILE_READ_BYTES` | integer | `512000` | Per-file read limit in bytes. |
| `max_file_write_bytes` | `--max-file-write-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_FILE_WRITE_BYTES` | integer | `5000000` | Per-file write/edit limit in bytes. |
| `max_grep_results` | `--max-grep-results` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_GREP_RESULTS` | integer | `200` | Maximum grep result count. |
| `max_directory_entries` | `--max-directory-entries` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_DIRECTORY_ENTRIES` | integer | `5000` | Maximum listed directory entries. |
| `max_glob_results` | `--max-glob-results` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_GLOB_RESULTS` | integer | `5000` | Maximum glob search results. |
| `max_tree_entries` | `--max-tree-entries` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_TREE_ENTRIES` | integer | `5000` | Maximum tree-view entries. |
| `max_read_many_files` | `--max-read-many-files` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_READ_MANY_FILES` | integer | `100` | Maximum files allowed to be read by read_many_files tool. |
| `max_read_many_total_bytes` | `--max-read-many-total-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_READ_MANY_TOTAL_BYTES` | integer | `5000000` | Maximum total byte limit for read_many_files tool. |
| `max_todos` | `--max-todos` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_TODOS` | integer | `1000` | Todo-list item limit. |
| `max_todo_bytes` | `--max-todo-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_TODO_BYTES` | integer | `1000000` | Todo-list total byte limit. |
| `max_audit_log_bytes` | `--max-audit-log-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_AUDIT_LOG_BYTES` | integer | `20000000` | Audit-log threshold in bytes. If exceeded, the log is rotated. |
| `max_tmp_files` | `--max-tmp-files` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_TMP_FILES` | integer | `500` | Temporary-file count limit. When exceeded, old files are deleted. |
| `max_tmp_bytes` | `--max-tmp-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_TMP_BYTES` | integer | `50000000` | Temporary-file byte limit. When exceeded, old files are deleted. |
| `max_concurrent_commands` | `--max-concurrent-commands` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_CONCURRENT_COMMANDS` | integer | `4` | Concurrent command limit. |
| `max_tmux_sessions` | `--max-tmux-sessions` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_MAX_TMUX_SESSIONS` | integer | `16` | Persistent shell session limit. |
| `file_download_enabled` | `--file-download-enabled` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_FILE_DOWNLOAD_ENABLED` | true \| false | `true` | Enable download links created by protected tools. |
| `file_download_default_ttl_s` | `--file-download-default-ttl-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_FILE_DOWNLOAD_DEFAULT_TTL_S` | integer | `3600` | Default lifetime for file download links in seconds. |
| `file_download_max_ttl_s` | `--file-download-max-ttl-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_FILE_DOWNLOAD_MAX_TTL_S` | integer | `604800` | Maximum lifetime accepted for file download links in seconds. |
| `file_download_default_max_downloads` | `--file-download-default-max-downloads` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_FILE_DOWNLOAD_DEFAULT_MAX_DOWNLOADS` | integer | `0` | Default download-count limit for file links; 0 means unlimited until expiry. |
| `file_download_max_file_bytes` | `--file-download-max-file-bytes` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_FILE_DOWNLOAD_MAX_FILE_BYTES` | integer | `0` | Maximum file size allowed for download links; 0 disables this size limit. |
| `command_denylist` | `--command-denylist` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_COMMAND_DENYLIST` | CSV or YAML list | `docker.sock,/var/run/docker.sock,mkfs,mount,umount,shutdown,reboot,systemctl,iptables,nft` | Comma-separated command denylist in env/CLI, or a YAML list in config files. Cleared when full-control mode is enabled. |
| `path_denylist` | `--path-denylist` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_PATH_DENYLIST` | CSV or YAML list | `.ssh/id_rsa,.ssh/id_ed25519,.env,secrets,credentials,.git/config` | Comma-separated path denylist in env/CLI, or a YAML list in config files. Cleared when full-control mode is enabled. |

## Remote workers

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `remote_enabled` | `--remote-enabled` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_REMOTE_ENABLED` | true \| false | `true` | Enable remote worker routes and MCP tools. |
| `remote_invite_ttl_s` | `--remote-invite-ttl-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_REMOTE_INVITE_TTL_S` | integer | `600` | One-time remote worker invite lifetime in seconds. |
| `remote_poll_timeout_s` | `--remote-poll-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_REMOTE_POLL_TIMEOUT_S` | integer | `25` | Remote worker long-poll heartbeat timeout in seconds. |
| `remote_job_timeout_s` | `--remote-job-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_REMOTE_JOB_TIMEOUT_S` | integer | `3600` | Control-side remote job result timeout in seconds. |

## Agent capability bridge

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `agent_bridge_enabled` | `--agent-bridge-enabled` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AGENT_BRIDGE_ENABLED` | true \| false | `true` | Enable agent capability bridge tools. |
| `agent_mcp_probe_timeout_s` | `--agent-mcp-probe-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AGENT_MCP_PROBE_TIMEOUT_S` | integer | `5` | Agent MCP server probe timeout in seconds. |
| `agent_mcp_call_timeout_s` | `--agent-mcp-call-timeout-s` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AGENT_MCP_CALL_TIMEOUT_S` | integer | `60` | Agent MCP tool-call timeout in seconds. |
| `agent_dynamic_mcp_tools` | `--agent-dynamic-mcp-tools` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AGENT_DYNAMIC_MCP_TOOLS` | true \| false | `true` | Register dynamic MCP bridge tools. |
| `agent_dynamic_skill_tools` | `--agent-dynamic-skill-tools` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_AGENT_DYNAMIC_SKILL_TOOLS` | true \| false | `true` | Register dynamic skill bridge tools. |

## Tool executables

| Setting | CLI | Environment | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| `shell_executable` | `--shell-executable` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_SHELL_EXECUTABLE` | string | `/bin/bash` | Shell executable used for shell commands. |
| `tmux_bin` | `--tmux-bin` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_TMUX_BIN` | string | `tmux` | tmux executable. |
| `rg_bin` | `--rg-bin` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_RG_BIN` | string | `rg` | ripgrep executable. |
| `python_bin` | `--python-bin` | `LOCAL_SHELL_MCP_PYTHON_BIN` | string | `python3` | Python executable. |

## Docker entrypoint settings

These variables are consumed by the Docker entrypoint before the Python application starts.

| Environment | Default | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `DOCKER_RUN_AS_ROOT` | `false` | Run the Dockerized MCP server itself as root. Prefer explicit sudo inside commands instead. |
| `DOCKER_PERSISTENT_CREDENTIALS` | `true` | Persist GitHub CLI, Git HTTPS credentials, GitCode credentials, SSH keys, .netrc, and GPG state across container rebuilds. |
| `DOCKER_CREDENTIALS_DIR` | `/persist/credentials` | Root directory for persisted credentials. The Docker Compose example stores it in the local-shell-mcp-credentials volume. |
| `DOCKER_CHOWN_WORKSPACE` | `true` | chown the mounted workspace to the agent user before starting the server. |

## Optional sidecar settings

| Environment | Default | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| `CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN` | `unset` | Optional token for the cloudflared tunnel sidecar profile. This uses Cloudflare Tunnel only, not Cloudflare Access. |
